---
title: 'Dynamic Wine Answers'
---

# Context

The tasting creation as a host must be fluid, easy and rapid process.
Right now there are too many manual edits for every wine.
Plus, a host with a low level of knwoledge about wine will have difficulties to "imagine" fun and good distractors.
Let's ease the tasting creation process and make it more fun and realistic.

# Steps to reproduce

As a host when I create a tasting
AND when I fill in every answer for the wine I am adding.

## Actual

THEN every answer is prefilled in the form text box - the correct answer and the distractors -
AND I must manually edit them.

## Expected

THEN every answer are prefilled - the correct answer and the distractors -
AND I can select in a list the answer I want
AND if the answer I want is not in the list I can directly add it.
AND the newly answer makes the answers "collection" grow for the next hosts.
